summary_en: JTM Holdings (hotel, travel, real estate, retail, medical, e-commerce operator) to acquire 55,211,079 shares (common 48,966,772 + preferred 6,244,307) at ¥17/share. Tender period May 18–Jun 12, 2026 (20 business days; extendable to 30 days). Post-acquisition ownership 53.99%. Board recommends; shareholders decide on tendering. Concurrent: subsidiary FRE transferred to parent Youtei Holdings; preferred dividend of ¥X (amount not disclosed) settled via offset against FRE proceeds.
title_en: Notice of Board Endorsement and Shareholder Neutrality Opinion Regarding Public Tender Offer for RISE Inc. Shares by JTM Holdings; Transfer of Consolidated Subsidiary Shares; Dividend on Preferred Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, RISE Inc. filed notice of a public tender offer for its shares initiated by JTM Holdings Co., Ltd., a company operating hotels, travel services, real estate, retail, food, medical, and e-commerce/IT/advertising businesses. The offer targets 55,211,079 shares (48,966,772 common shares and 6,244,307 Series A preferred shares) at ¥17 per share, with a tender period of May 18–June 12, 2026 (20 business days, extendable to 30 days under applicable law). Upon completion at the indicated minimum quantity, JTM Holdings will own 53.99% of RISE. The RISE board has voted to endorse the offer but has left the decision to tender to shareholders. Concurrently, RISE will transfer its entire stake in subsidiary FRE Asset Management to parent company Youtei Holdings and will pay a dividend on its preferred shares, with the dividend and FRE sale proceeds to be offset against each other.
